pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Adds Exclusive Self Attention, per-layer value-residual/gated attention hooks, EMA, and AdamW test-time training on thwu1 base to sharpen validation adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Performs AdamW test-time training on validation tokens across frozen bottom layers prior to evaluation.
techniques: XSA in final layers to remove self-value bias
Layer-wise value-residual and gated attention scalars
EMA weights plus AdamW TTT over validation data
